posts.text: A Beginner's Guide To The Indian Stock Market - Karthik Rangappa — I have ordered it already

posts.author: nithin_kumrr
posts.text: A Beginner's Guide To The Indian Stock Market - Karthik Rangappa — I know quite a few people in my circle whose investing journey started with Varsity modules and eventually led them to explore the rest of Zerodha’s products. Karthik Rangappa has now authored: A Beginner’s Guide to the Indian Stock Market published with HarperCollins. If you’re getting started, know someone, or enjoy reading physical books, this would be a good one.
